items.title: A study estimates the iPhone's diffusion explains 33%-52% of the decline in US births from 2007 to 2011, with the most pronounced effects among women aged 15-24 (Sabrina Tavernise/New York Times)
items.summary:
Sabrina Tavernise / New York Times:
A study estimates the iPhone's diffusion explains 33%-52% of the decline in US births from 2007 to 2011, with the most pronounced effects among women aged 15-24  —  Modern smartphones rolled out in 2007, the year that fertility rates began falling.  Two studies say that is not a coincidence.

items.title: EcoFlow 48-hour flash sale offers DELTA 3 Max power station + 20W GaN charger at $779, more from $1,249
items.summary:
EcoFlow has kicking off its Early Prime Day Sale that will lead up to Amazon’s upcoming savings event by offering up to 62% discounts on power stations and plenty of extra savings opportunities – plus, there’s a 48-hour flash sale right out the gate on four units. Three of the included units are power station-focused, starting with EcoFlow’s DELTA 3 Max Portable Power Station bundled with a 20W GaN Charger at $779 shipped, beating out the chargerless Amazon pricing by $20 (or by $40 when considering the charger’s value). Down from $1,519 here, in 2026 we’ve mostly been seeing the standalone station spending the time through March down at $1,199, while the months since have seen it keep even lower between $799 and $749. For the next two days, you can score it with $740 in combined savings, landing at the second-lowest price we have tracked in 2026. Head below to browse the other power station and dual extra battery deals.

Today’s Best Buy deal cuts $300 off that price, delivering the steepest discount we’ve tracked on this model so far.
